title: Garlicky Filipino pumpkin pinoy fried-rice
description: Quick-fix filipino dish featuring pumpkin and a garlicky flavor. Ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly for a balanced meal.

ingredients.name: pumpkin
ingredients.notes: any variety of pumpkin will do, e.g. butternut squash or hubbard squash

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the cubed pumpkin and sauté for 5 minutes or until lightly browned.
Add the garlic, onion, and chili pepper to the skillet and sauté for another 2 minutes.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until combined with the vegetables and pumpkin.
Season with fish sauce to taste.
Serve the garlicky pumpkin pinoy fried-rice immediately and enjoy!
Cook time can be reduced by using leftover rice from a previous meal.
